mapper.select: select id, conversation_id, user_id, peer_id, unread_count, last_read_message_id, last_read_time, create_time, update_time from chat_conversation_user where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into chat_conversation_user(conversation_id, user_id, peer_id, unread_count, last_read_message_id, last_read_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{peerId}, #{unreadCount}, #{lastReadMessageId}, #{lastReadTime}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update chat_conversation_user set unread_count = 0, last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId}, last_read_time = now(), update_time = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select id, conversation_id, user_id, peer_id, unread_count, last_read_message_id, last_read_time, create_time, update_time from chat_conversation_user where user_id = #{userId} order by update_time desc

select ccu.conversation_id as conversationId, ccu.peer_id as peerId, u.username as peerName, u.icon as peerIcon, ccu.unread_count as unreadCount, c.last_message_id as lastMessageId, lm.content as lastMessageContent, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime from chat_conversation_user ccu join chat_conversation c on c.id = ccu.conversation_id left join chat_message lm on lm.id = c.last_message_id left join user u on u.id = ccu.peer_id where ccu.user_id = #{userId} order by c.last_message_time desc, ccu.update_time desc
